Usage: gaia search lkm reasoning [OPTIONS] [QUERY]

 Search reasoning chains, or fetch them for one claim with --claim-id.

в•­в”Ђ Arguments в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв•®
в”‚   query      [QUERY]  Topic to search for reasoning chains or workflows.     в”‚
в•°в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв•Ї
в•­в”Ђ Options в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв•®
в”‚ --index,--server              TEXT                    Configured LKM index   в”‚
в”‚                                                       id.                    в”‚
в”‚ --claim-id                    TEXT                    Inspect reasoning for  в”‚
в”‚                                                       one claim id. Accepts  в”‚
в”‚                                                       bare gcn_... ids or    в”‚
в”‚                                                       lkm:<index>:gcn_...    в”‚
в”‚                                                       refs from search       в”‚
в”‚                                                       results.               в”‚
в”‚ --retrieval-mode              [semantic|lexical|hybr  Retrieval channel.     в”‚
в”‚                               id]                     [default: hybrid]      в”‚
в”‚ --keywords                    TEXT                    Keyword for the        в”‚
в”‚                                                       lexical channel        в”‚
в”‚                                                       (repeatable, max 10).  в”‚
в”‚ --paper-ids,--paper-id        TEXT                    Restrict query mode to в”‚
в”‚                                                       these source paper ids в”‚
в”‚                                                       (repeatable, max 50;   в”‚
в”‚                                                       numeric strings only,  в”‚
в”‚                                                       no `paper:` prefix).   в”‚
в”‚ --doi                         TEXT                    Restrict query mode to в”‚
в”‚                                                       these source DOI       в”‚
в”‚                                                       values (repeatable,    в”‚
в”‚                                                       max 50).               в”‚
в”‚ --max-chains                  INTEGER                 Maximum backing chains в”‚
в”‚                                                       for --claim-id mode    в”‚
в”‚                                                       (max 100).             в”‚
в”‚                                                       [default: 10]          в”‚
в”‚ --sort-by                     [relevance|recent|jour  Ranking profile. Query в”‚
в”‚                               nal|comprehensive]      mode accepts           в”‚
в”‚                                                       relevance, recent,     в”‚
в”‚                                                       journal, or            в”‚
в”‚                                                       comprehensive;         в”‚
в”‚                                                       --claim-id mode        в”‚
в”‚                                                       accepts comprehensive  в”‚
в”‚                                                       or recent.             в”‚
в”‚                                                       [default:              в”‚
в”‚                                                       comprehensive]         в”‚
в”‚ --offset                      INTEGER                 Query-search           в”‚
в”‚                                                       pagination offset (max в”‚
в”‚                                                       10000).                в”‚
в”‚                                                       [default: 0]           в”‚
в”‚ --limit                       INTEGER                 Query-search page size в”‚
в”‚                                                       (max 100).             в”‚
в”‚                                                       [default: 20]          в”‚
в”‚ --out                         PATH                    Write JSON to PATH     в”‚
в”‚                                                       (atomic) instead of    в”‚
в”‚                                                       stdout.                в”‚
в”‚ --no-hint                                             Suppress Gaia          в”‚
в”‚                                                       follow-up suggestions  в”‚
в”‚                                                       on stderr.             в”‚
в”‚ --help                                                Show this message and  в”‚
в”‚                                                       exit.                  в”‚
в•°в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв•Ї

 Use query mode as a search surface for reasoning chains and workflows. It is
 parallel to `knowledge <query>`, which searches paper knowledge items such as
 conclusions, weak points, highlights, problems, and open questions.
 Use --claim-id only when you already have a claim id and want that claim's
 supporting reasoning graph.
 Query mode accepts search filters (--paper-id, --doi, --sort-by). --claim-id
 mode fetches one claim's backing chains and only accepts --max-chains plus
 --sort-by comprehensive|recent.
 Query API docs:
 https://s.apifox.cn/<UUID4>/api-459807117
 Claim API docs:
 https://s.apifox.cn/<UUID4>/api-459807347
 Endpoint links: gaia search lkm docs
